title: blumea manilaliana
intro: Blumea manilaliana, also known as Manilaliana, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Blumea manilaliana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from various skin conditions. Blumea manilaliana is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
